title: caucalis latifolia
intro: Caucalis latifolia, also known as the horned poppy or broad-leaved caucalis, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Caucalis latifolia include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Caucalis latifolia is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
